The '''Battle of Moorja''' was a battle of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] that took place on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Moorja/Legends|Moorja]].

==The battle==
During the Battle of [[Moorja/Legends|Moorja]], [[Koorivar Fusiliers/Legends|Koorivar Fusiliers]] were utilized under the command of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Oro Dassyne/Legends|Oro Dassyne]].<ref name="TNEGtAS" />

==Aftermath==
After the Battle of Moorja, [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Gap Nox]] became a [[Bodyguard/Legends|bodyguard]] of [[Viceroy/Legends|Viceroy]] [[Nute Gunray/Legends|Nute Gunray]].<ref name="Insider 147">{{InsiderCite|147|Rogues Gallery|Rogues Gallery: The Devious Neimoidians Revealed}}</ref>

{{Battle-stub}}
